title: Design drainage systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Design drainage systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine design requirements

pcs.text: Determine water transfer, recharge, reuse and harvesting system needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine water transfer, recharge, reuse and harvesting system needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine water transfer, recharge, reuse and harvesting system needs.

pcs.text: Identify processes of collecting, disposing and storing drainage water to avoid degrading water quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify processes of collecting, disposing and storing drainage water to avoid degrading water quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify processes of collecting, disposing and storing drainage water to avoid degrading water quality.

pcs.text: Investigate regional geology and geography to predict drainage parameters
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate regional geology and geography to predict drainage parameters?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate regional geology and geography to predict drainage parameters.

pcs.text: Apply hydrological calculations to predict volumes and rates of surface run-off
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply hydrological calculations to predict volumes and rates of surface run-off?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply hydrological calculations to predict volumes and rates of surface run-off.

pcs.text: Conduct site investigations to assess depth of clay, depth of ground water, soil and water salinity, and structural or chemical impediments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct site investigations to assess depth of clay, depth of ground water, soil and water salinity, and structural or chemical impediments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct site investigations to assess depth of clay, depth of ground water, soil and water salinity, and structural or chemical impediments.

pcs.text: Determine the most cost effective drainage system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the most cost effective drainage system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the most cost effective drainage system.

pcs.text: Document predictions of leaching fractions and salt movements, and develop soil amelioration and drainage management plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document predictions of leaching fractions and salt movements, and develop soil amelioration and drainage management plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document predictions of leaching fractions and salt movements, and develop soil amelioration and drainage management plans.

pcs.text: Determine the need for leachate interception and dewatering system and if required prepare construction specification for interception and collection, disposal, reuse or recycle
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the need for leachate interception and dewatering system and if required prepare construction specification for interception and collection, disposal, reuse or recycle?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the need for leachate interception and dewatering system and if required prepare construction specification for interception and collection, disposal, reuse or recycle.

pcs.text: Confirm drains and structures are capable of carrying the design water volumes and intensities according to workplace standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm drains and structures are capable of carrying the design water volumes and intensities according to workplace standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm drains and structures are capable of carrying the design water volumes and intensities according to workplace standards.

pcs.text: Identify construction specifications required to make drainage systems according to environmental and workplace health and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify construction specifications required to make drainage systems according to environmental and workplace health and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify construction specifications required to make drainage systems according to environmental and workplace health and safety requirements.

pcs.text: Identify and protect environmentally sensitive areas according to local, state and federal legislation and regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and protect environmentally sensitive areas according to local, state and federal legislation and regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and protect environmentally sensitive areas according to local, state and federal legislation and regulations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine design requirements

elements.title: Design a drainage system

pcs.text: Select systems, including relevant equipment, to move water efficiently to water storage or treatment and at the flow and pressure required in design specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select systems, including relevant equipment, to move water efficiently to water storage or treatment and at the flow and pressure required in design specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select systems, including relevant equipment, to move water efficiently to water storage or treatment and at the flow and pressure required in design specifications.

pcs.text: Select system combinations that are efficient, reliable, functional, serviceable and flexible for the intended application
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select system combinations that are efficient, reliable, functional, serviceable and flexible for the intended application?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select system combinations that are efficient, reliable, functional, serviceable and flexible for the intended application.

pcs.text: Determine energy requirements and check layout of electricity lines with local authority if electrical pumps and motors are used in the system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine energy requirements and check layout of electricity lines with local authority if electrical pumps and motors are used in the system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine energy requirements and check layout of electricity lines with local authority if electrical pumps and motors are used in the system.

pcs.text: Select and integrate structures, pipes, valves and accessories into a functional system that can be monitored and maintained
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and integrate structures, pipes, valves and accessories into a functional system that can be monitored and maintained?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and integrate structures, pipes, valves and accessories into a functional system that can be monitored and maintained.

pcs.text: Define the work required to make suitable drainage systems available to the workplace in the design specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define the work required to make suitable drainage systems available to the workplace in the design specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define the work required to make suitable drainage systems available to the workplace in the design specifications.

pcs.text: Confirm power supply design specification with power authorities if electrical pumps and motors are used in the system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm power supply design specification with power authorities if electrical pumps and motors are used in the system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm power supply design specification with power authorities if electrical pumps and motors are used in the system.

pcs.text: Minimise drainage system design damage based on current industry practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise drainage system design damage based on current industry practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise drainage system design damage based on current industry practice.

pcs.text: Document drainage system design based on current industry practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document drainage system design based on current industry practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document drainage system design based on current industry practice.

pcs.text: Confirm design output with an appropriately experienced and qualified person
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm design output with an appropriately experienced and qualified person?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm design output with an appropriately experienced and qualified person.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Design a drainage system
